title: commersonia jackiana
intro: Commersonia jackiana, also known as the Pink Rock-pea or Donkey's Fruit, is a small, flowering plant that belongs to the family Malvaceae and is native to Western Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds that provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Commersonia jackiana can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
